Commercial Aviation Is Costing You More Than Money

3+ Hours Lost Per Trip

Security lines, boarding, baggage claim, delays. That's a full workday gone every round trip.

Hidden Costs Add Up

Hotels for layovers, rental cars, airport meals, parking. The ticket price is just the beginning.

Lost Revenue Opportunities

Hours in terminals aren't closing deals. Time is your most valuable asset—stop wasting it.

Why High Achievers Choose Private Charter

01

Arrive 15 Minutes Before Departure

No 2-hour arrivals. No security theater. Just show up and fly.

02

Your Office in the Sky

Wi-Fi, privacy, and space to work. Turn flight time into productive time.

03

Same-Day Returns

Meet in the morning, home for dinner. No hotels, no wasted days.

04

40,000 Destinations

Commercial flies to 500. We fly to 40,000. Closer to your final destination.

05

Complete Flexibility

Change plans last-minute. Your schedule, not theirs.

06

No Membership Required

Pay only for flights you book. No upfront commitments or fees.

Three Steps to Your First Private Flight

Request Your Free Quote

Tell us your route, dates, and passenger count. Takes 60 seconds.

Compare Aircraft Options

Receive curated options within minutes. Compare pricing, aircraft, and amenities.

Book & Fly

Confirm your flight. Arrive 15 minutes before departure. Enjoy the journey.

Frequently Asked Questions

Private jet charter varies by aircraft type, distance, and timing. Light jets start around $5,000-$7,000 per flight hour, midsize jets $7,000-$9,000, and heavy jets $10,000-$15,000+. Empty leg deals can reduce costs by 50-75%. Get a free quote to see exact pricing for your route.

Absolutely. All aircraft in the Villiers network are operated by FAA Part 135 certified operators with the highest safety ratings. Many hold ARGUS Platinum, Wyvern Wingman, and IS-BAO certifications—the aviation industry's gold standards. Every flight is fully insured.

While we recommend booking as early as possible for best availability, private jets can be arranged with as little as 4-6 hours notice. For optimal aircraft selection and pricing, 2-3 days advance notice is ideal. Empty leg deals are typically available 24-48 hours before departure.

No. Unlike jet cards or fractional ownership, there are no membership fees, initiation costs, or long-term commitments. You pay only for the flights you book. Free quote, free cancellation, no hidden fees.

Private jets can access over 40,000 airports worldwide—compared to about 500 for commercial airlines. This means you can fly closer to your final destination, often landing at smaller regional airports just minutes from your meeting or resort.

Yes! Pets fly free and travel in the cabin with you. No crates, no cargo hold. Just bring your pet's documentation and they're welcome aboard. Some operators may have size restrictions, so mention pets when requesting your quote.
